about.description: Founded in 2014, we are a dedicated producer and supplier of high-quality seafood products, including tuna, sardines, and mackerel. Our focus on consistent quality, industry standards, and reliable sourcing supports our partnerships with retailers and food distributors.

hero.title: About us
hero.subtitle: Delivering premium seafood products with global quality standards and sustainable sourcing since 2014.

overview.title: A Legacy of Excellence in Global Seafood Export
overview.description:
Capital Food International Co., Ltd. was established in April 2014 as a holding company for seafood processing operations in Thailand. The company specializes in the processing and export of high-quality tuna, sardines, and mackerel products.

With advanced production technology and strict quality control systems, Capital Food International ensures that its products meet international food safety and quality standards. The company is committed to delivering reliable, competitively produced seafood products tailored to global market requirements.

Through continuous operational development and a strong export network, Capital Food International Co., Ltd. has positioned itself as a trusted supplier in the international seafood industry.

missionVision.visionDesc: To be the most trusted global seafood supplier, recognized for quality, sustainability, and partnership. We aim to set the standard for responsible sourcing and food safety in the industry.
missionVision.missionDesc: To deliver premium seafood products that meet the highest international standards while fostering long-term relationships with our customers. We commit to continuous improvement, food safety, and sustainable practices in every step of our operations.

qualityExcellence.title: Quality Excellence
qualityExcellence.desc: We maintain the highest standards in every product we deliver.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Transparent, ethical practices in all our business relationships.

foodSafety.title: Food Safety
foodSafety.desc: Rigorous controls and certifications to protect consumers.

customerPartnership.title: Customer Partnership
customerPartnership.desc: Long-term relationships built on trust and reliability.

continuousImprovement.title: Continuous Improvement
continuousImprovement.desc: Innovation and learning to stay ahead of industry standards.

qualityStandards.title: Global Compliance & Quality Standards
qualityStandards.description: We adhere to strict quality control and food safety management systems. Our facilities are designed and operated to meet international standards, ensuring every product meets regulatory requirements and customer expectations. From raw material intake to finished product dispatch, we maintain full traceability and documented procedures.

hero.title: Premium Tuna Products
hero.subtitle: High-quality tuna prepared to meet international food standards and export requirements.

introduction.title: TUNA
introduction.paragraph1: We serve CANNED TUNA the tasty meal from the sea. Tuna is one of the popular commercial fishes. It is the oily fish, contained a high amount of Vitamin D and good source of Omega-3 fatty acids suitable for infants, children, men and woman.
introduction.paragraph2: We are exporter for canned tuna (light meat tuna /Bonito Tuna, Skipjack Tuna and white meat Tuna / Yellow fin and Tonggol tuna) in variety of recipes such as vegetable Oil, Brine, Brine and Oil etc.
introduction.paragraph3: It's absolutely that our Canned Tuna is also enrich of Protein, low in Fat and Calories. It is the excellent source of essential Omega-3 Fatty Acids which help to lower blood pressure and cholesterol as the products are produced under strictly control to ensure the freshness and meet the world standards of sanitation and hygienic…

collection.title: Our Tuna Collection
collection.subtitle: A variety of formats and pack sizes to meet global culinary needs and retail, food service, and industrial requirements.

sunflowerOil.title: Tuna in Sunflower Oil
sunflowerOil.description: Premium skipjack tuna in refined sunflower oil. Mild taste, ideal for salads and sandwiches.

oliveOil.title: Tuna in Olive Oil
oliveOil.description: Select tuna in extra virgin olive oil. Rich flavor for gourmet and Mediterranean recipes.

brine.title: Tuna in Brine
brine.description: Light tuna in natural brine. Low fat, high protein—perfect for health-conscious consumers.

chunks.title: Tuna Chunks
chunks.description: Solid tuna chunks in oil or brine. Versatile for casseroles, pasta, and ready meals.

flakes.title: Tuna Flakes
flakes.description: Flaked tuna for spreads, fillings, and food service. Consistent quality, easy to use.

custom.title: Custom Formulation
custom.description: Private label and custom recipes to match your market and brand.

export.title: Export & Global Logistics
export.description: We handle export documentation, cold-chain shipping, and customs clearance so your tuna reaches 40+ countries in optimal condition. Tracked shipments and full export documentation included.

introduction.title: SARDINES / MACKEREL
introduction.paragraph1: Sardines / Mackerel are known as well as in the processing of canned fish.
introduction.paragraph2: Popular product: SARDINES / MACKEREL IN TOMATO SAUCE, SARDINES / MACKEREL IN OIL WITH CHILI. Sardines / Mackerel are known as well as in the processing of canned fish in various sauces such as tomato sauce, oil, or brine. Or dishes such as grilled or smoked. Which sardines nutrition than milk or 3 times with fish of 100 grams of various nutrients like Omega 3 to 200 mg, which is sufficient for the needs of the human body each week. It also contains phosphorus, copper, magnesium alloy, iron, manganese, lycopene and vitamin B
